goal: Verify IRB 6700 swept volume does not breach the 2.5 m ISO 10218-1 clearance to the safety fence across the trajectory — geometric check, NOT safety certification.
thoughts: Static collision at sampled poses is weaker than continuous swept-volume — pragmatic middle is dense sampling + inflation margin (e.g. 200 mm). Isaac Sim does NOT replace a notified-body risk assessment; be explicit. ISO 10218-2 separation-distance formula is the engineer's job to apply — the tool computes clearance, the engineer decides pass/fail. 'Just add 500 mm and call it done' is the wrong answer — give the ISO-formula-backed pipeline.
code:
# 1. Confirm fence + all robot link paths
list_all_prims(root="/World/Cell/SafetyFence")
list_all_prims(root="/World/IRB_6700", schema_filter="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# 2. Dense-sample the trajectory for collision+clearance
check_collisions(
    scope="/World/IRB_6700",
    other="/World/Cell/SafetyFence",
    sample_along_trajectory=True,
    sample_count="<N_SAMPLES>",
    inflation="<MARGIN_M>"    # e.g. 0.2 m robot inflation
)

# 3. Geometric sanity on the fence mesh (no holes / degenerate tris invisibly)
run_stage_analysis(scope="/World/Cell/SafetyFence")

# 4. Live clearance monitor during the cycle (worst-case per segment)
set_clearance_monitor(
    subject="/World/IRB_6700",
    boundary="/World/Cell/SafetyFence",
    min_clearance_m=2.5,
    log_csv="<CLEARANCE_CSV>"
)

# 5. Ground the scope explicitly: sim = geometric pre-validation, NOT certification
lookup_knowledge(query="ISO 10218-1 10218-2 separation distance formula robot cell safety sim verification")

# Report format (pass/fail table):
#  waypoint_segment | worst_clearance_m | pass(>=2.5) | note
#  1 -> 2           | 2.73              | PASS        | ok
#  5 -> 6           | 2.41              | FAIL        | joint-2 sweep near east fence
# CRITICAL: notified-body risk assessment is SEPARATE. This pass/fail is geometric only.
failure_modes: Sampling only at waypoints — between waypoints the sweep can still breach
Quoting 2.5 m without inflation margin — ignores articulation link radius
Claiming the output is a SISTEMA-compatible safety report — it is not
Adding arbitrary 500 mm fudge instead of applying ISO 10218-2 formula
